name: Teething Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the eggs into a bowl.
2. Stir in one direction until creamy.
3. Add 1 cup sugar and continue stirring in the same direction.
4. Gradually stir in 2 to 2 1/2 cups sifted flour into the mixture, continuing to stir in the same direction until stiff.
5. Roll out dough using a rolling pin between two lightly floured sheets of wax paper to a thickness of 3/4 inch.
6. Cut out doughnut-shaped cookies.
7. Place the cookies on a lightly buttered cookie sheet.
8. Let stand overnight (10-12 hours).
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees until lightly browned and hard.
Makes approximately 12 sturdy, relatively crumbproof teething biscuits.
